tree.setup: Sunday morning. You wake to find water seeping under your bathroom door with the quiet determination of a river reclaiming its territory. A pipe has burst somewhere in the wall. The property management office is staffed by Mr. Guo, a man who speaks about plumbing the way poets speak about the sea — with deep feeling and an alarming number of technical terms.
tree.setup_zh: 星期天早晨。你醒来发现水正以河流收复领土般的坚定从浴室门下渗出来。墙里的水管不知道在哪里破了。物业管理处值班的是郭师傅，一个谈起水管就像诗人谈大海一样的人——充满深情，还有大量令人眩晕的专业术语。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 物业管理处，您好。有什么问题？
turns.text_pinyin: wùyè guǎnlǐ chù, nín hǎo. yǒu shénme wèntí?
turns.text_en: Property management, hello. What's the problem?

options.text_zh: 你好，我是五号楼302的住户。我家水管破了，浴室全是水。请你们快点派人来修。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ shì wǔ hào lóu sān líng èr de zhùhù. wǒ jiā shuǐguǎn pò le, yùshì quán shì shuǐ. qǐng nǐmen kuài diǎn pài rén lái xiū.
options.text_en: Hello, I'm the resident of Building 5, unit 302. A pipe burst in my home — the bathroom is flooded. Please send someone to fix it quickly.
options.feedback: Address, problem, urgency — all covered in one breath. Mr. Guo is already reaching for his toolbox.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ jiā lòu shuǐ le, hěn yánzhòng!
options.text_en: My home is leaking — it's serious!
options.feedback: The severity is clear. He'll need your unit number, which he'll ask for next.

options.text_en: There's a small issue with the pipes.
options.feedback: 有点 undersells the situation considerably. Mr. Guo will discover the truth soon enough.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 五号楼302，收到。你先把总阀门关掉，一般在厨房水槽下面或者卫生间进门的地方。
turns.text_pinyin: wǔ hào lóu sān líng èr, shōu dào. nǐ xiān bǎ zǒng fámén guān diào, yìbān zài chúfáng shuǐcáo xiàmian huòzhě wèishēngjiān jìn mén de dìfāng.
turns.text_en: Building 5, 302, noted. First, turn off the main valve — it's usually under the kitchen sink or near the bathroom entrance.

options.text_zh: 好的，我去找阀门。在厨房水槽下面找到了！关好了。
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ qù zhǎo fámén. zài chúfáng shuǐcáo xiàmian zhǎo dào le! guān hǎo le.
options.text_en: OK, I'll look for the valve. Found it under the kitchen sink! It's off now.
options.feedback: Quick action. Mr. Guo's voice softens with approval — a tenant who can find the valve is worth their weight in copper piping.

options.text_pinyin: fámén zài nǎlǐ? wǒ zhǎo bú dào.
options.text_en: Where's the valve? I can't find it.
options.feedback: He'll guide you through it — check behind the toilet, under the sink, near the water heater.
Mr. Guo takes a deep breath. This will be a teaching moment. He has many of those.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 很好。我二十分钟之内到。你先用毛巾把地上的水擦一下，不然可能会漏到楼下去。
turns.text_pinyin: hěn hǎo. wǒ èrshí fēnzhōng zhī nèi dào. nǐ xiān yòng máojīn bǎ dì shàng de shuǐ cā yíxià, bùrán kěnéng huì lòu dào lóu xià qù.
turns.text_en: Good. I'll be there within twenty minutes. Try to mop up the water with towels, or it might leak to the floor below.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Acknowledge and ask if you should notify the neighbor below.

options.text_zh: 好的，我现在就擦。要不要先通知楼下的邻居？
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ xiànzài jiù cā. yào búyào xiān tōngzhī lóu xià de línjū?
options.text_en: OK, I'll mop now. Should I notify the neighbor downstairs?
options.feedback: Thinking of the neighbors — Mr. Guo is genuinely impressed. Considerate tenants are rarer than good pipes.

options.text_en: OK, I'll try to mop up.
options.feedback: He hears the determination in your voice. Twenty minutes never felt so long.

options.text_pinyin: shuǐ tài duō le, máojīn búgòu yòng.
options.text_en: There's too much water — I don't have enough towels.
options.feedback: Mr. Guo suggests bedsheets as backup. Plumbing emergencies are not the time for textile preferences.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 对，最好告诉楼下一声。我马上就到。
turns.text_pinyin: duì, zuìhǎo gàosu lóu xià yì shēng. wǒ mǎshàng jiù dào.
turns.text_en: Yes, best to let them know. I'm on my way.

options.text_zh: 太谢谢你了，郭师傅！周末还麻烦你，真不好意思。
options.text_pinyin: tài xièxie nǐ le, Guō shīfu! zhōumò hái máfan nǐ, zhēn bù hǎoyìsi.
options.text_en: Thank you so much, Mr. Guo! Sorry to trouble you on a weekend.
options.feedback: Acknowledging the weekend intrusion — Mr. Guo waves it off.「水管不分周末，」he says. Pipes don't observe weekends.
Urgent but grateful. He's already out the door.
Mr. Guo doesn't take it personally. His relationship is with the pipes, not the tenants.

tree.cultural_note: Most Chinese apartment compounds have a 物业管理处 (wùyè guǎnlǐ chù, property management office) that handles maintenance, security, and repairs. Knowing where your 总阀门 (zǒng fámén, main water valve) is can save your apartment — and your downstairs neighbor's ceiling.
